requirement_topic.en: No Horizontal RoHS Substance-Restriction Regime in Pakistan
requirement_topic.zh: 巴基斯坦无横向 RoHS 物质限制制度
requirement_topic.zht: 巴基斯坦無橫向 RoHS 物質限制制度

summary.en: Pakistan does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS substance-restriction regime for electrical and electronic equipment. There is no Pakistan law equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) restricting lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE and the four phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) in homogeneous materials as a market-access condition for LED luminaires. PSQCA conformity assessment for lamps/luminaires focuses on electrical safety and performance to the adopted PS/IEC standards (see ledpk-safety-01/02), not on a horizontal hazardous-substance restriction. Consequently, there is no mandatory RoHS Declaration of Conformity, no maximum-concentration-value testing, and no RoHS-style marking required for the Pakistan market itself. Note: individual buyers, multinational brands, or specific tender specifications may contractually require RoHS-equivalent compliance, but that is a private/commercial requirement, not Pakistani law. Importers should confirm whether any product-specific chemical-safety or labelling rule applies for the particular item.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦并未实施欧盟式针对电气电子设备的横向 RoHS 物质限制制度。巴基斯坦没有相当于欧盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）的法律，将均质材料中的铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 及四项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）限制作为 LED 灯具的市场准入条件。PSQCA 对灯/灯具的合格评定侧重采标 PS/IEC 标准的电气安全和性能（见 ledpk-safety-01/02），而非横向有害物质限制。因此，巴基斯坦市场本身不要求强制性 RoHS 符合性声明、最大浓度值检测或 RoHS 式标志。注意：个别买方、跨国品牌或特定招标规范可能以合同方式要求 RoHS 等效合规，但那是私人/商业要求，并非巴基斯坦法律。进口商应确认具体项目是否适用任何产品特定的化学安全或标签规则。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦並未實施歐盟式針對電氣電子設備的橫向 RoHS 物質限制制度。巴基斯坦沒有相當於歐盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）的法律，將均質材料中的鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 及四項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）限制作為 LED 燈具的市場准入條件。PSQCA 對燈/燈具的合格評定側重採標 PS/IEC 標準的電氣安全和性能（見 ledpk-safety-01/02），而非橫向有害物質限制。因此，巴基斯坦市場本身不要求強制性 RoHS 符合性聲明、最大濃度值檢測或 RoHS 式標誌。注意：個別買方、跨國品牌或特定招標規範可能以合同方式要求 RoHS 等效合規，但那是私人/商業要求，並非巴基斯坦法律。進口商應確認具體項目是否適用任何產品特定的化學安全或標籤規則。

standards_or_laws: No Pakistan horizontal RoHS regime — no national equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) / Directive (EU) 2015/863 restricting substances in EEE as a market-access condition
PSQCA Act 1996 — conformity assessment is safety/performance-based for items on the PSQCA Conformity Assessment list, not a hazardous-substance restriction

summary.en: China operates GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original six RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS, together with China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014) which mandates a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange / green logo) on EEE sold in China. As of 2026, the four EU phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) are not yet in China's mandatory restricted list under GB/T 26572. China's regime is therefore primarily a disclosure-labelling scheme rather than an outright market-access restriction.
summary.zh: 中国实施 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原六项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同，并配合中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014），要求在中国销售的 EEE 上加施有害物质披露标识（橙色/绿色标志）。截至 2026 年，四项欧盟邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）尚未纳入中国 GB/T 26572 强制限制清单。因此中国制度主要为披露标签方案，而非彻底的市场准入限制。
summary.zht: 中國實施 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原六項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同，並配合中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014），要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上加施有害物質披露標識（橙色/綠色標誌）。截至 2026 年，四項歐盟鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）尚未納入中國 GB/T 26572 強制限制清單。因此中國制度主要為披露標籤方案，而非徹底的市場准入限制。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers the original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Unlike the China-to-EU lane, there is no incremental RoHS substance-restriction gap to close for the Pakistan market — Pakistan has no horizontal RoHS regime, so Chinese manufacturers do not need to test for the four EU phthalates or produce a RoHS DoC for Pakistan market access. The relevant substances obligation on the China side remains the existing China RoHS 2 disclosure label (SJ/T 11364) and the six-substance limits (GB/T 26572), which the manufacturer already applies for the China market. Practical points: (1) do not assume EU RoHS testing is required for Pakistan — it is not a legal market-access condition there; (2) where a Pakistani buyer, multinational brand, or tender contractually demands RoHS-equivalent compliance, treat it as a commercial specification and provide the relevant substance test evidence accordingly; (3) the China RoHS disclosure label is a China-market marking and is neither required nor recognised by PSQCA for Pakistan placement.
gap.zh: 与中国出口欧盟通道不同，巴基斯坦市场不存在需弥补的增量 RoHS 物质限制差距——巴基斯坦无横向 RoHS 制度，故中国制造商无需为巴基斯坦市场准入检测四项欧盟邻苯二甲酸酯或出具 RoHS 符合性声明。中国侧相关的物质义务仍为现行中国 RoHS 2 披露标识（SJ/T 11364）及六项物质限值（GB/T 26572），制造商已为中国市场适用。实际要点：（1）请勿假定巴基斯坦要求欧盟 RoHS 检测——在该国并非法律市场准入条件；（2）当巴基斯坦买方、跨国品牌或招标以合同方式要求 RoHS 等效合规时，应视为商业规范并相应提供相关物质检测证据；（3）中国 RoHS 披露标识为中国市场标志，巴基斯坦投放既不要求亦不被 PSQCA 认可。
gap.zht: 與中國出口歐盟通道不同，巴基斯坦市場不存在需彌補的增量 RoHS 物質限制差距——巴基斯坦無橫向 RoHS 制度，故中國製造商無需為巴基斯坦市場准入檢測四項歐盟鄰苯二甲酸酯或出具 RoHS 符合性聲明。中國側相關的物質義務仍為現行中國 RoHS 2 披露標識（SJ/T 11364）及六項物質限值（GB/T 26572），製造商已為中國市場適用。實際要點：（1）請勿假定巴基斯坦要求歐盟 RoHS 檢測——在該國並非法律市場准入條件；（2）當巴基斯坦買方、跨國品牌或招標以合同方式要求 RoHS 等效合規時，應視為商業規範並相應提供相關物質檢測證據；（3）中國 RoHS 披露標識為中國市場標誌，巴基斯坦投放既不要求亦不被 PSQCA 認可。

mandatory_status.target: Not required — Pakistan has no horizontal RoHS substance-restriction regime; no mandatory RoHS DoC, MCV testing, or RoHS marking for Pakistan market access. RoHS-equivalent compliance may arise only as a private/commercial (buyer or tender) requirement.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label (SJ/T 11364) required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 EU phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan has no EU-style horizontal RoHS substance-restriction regime, so there is no legal requirement to test for restricted substances or the four EU phthalates, and no RoHS DoC or RoHS marking, for Pakistan market access. The applicable substances obligation remains China's own RoHS 2 disclosure label (SJ/T 11364) and GB/T 26572 limits, which are China-market measures. RoHS-equivalent compliance for Pakistan would only arise as a private buyer/brand/tender requirement — confirm any such commercial specification with the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦无欧盟式横向 RoHS 物质限制制度，故巴基斯坦市场准入无须检测限制物质或四项欧盟邻苯二甲酸酯，亦无 RoHS 符合性声明或 RoHS 标志要求。适用的物质义务仍为中国自身的 RoHS 2 披露标识（SJ/T 11364）及 GB/T 26572 限值，属中国市场措施。巴基斯坦的 RoHS 等效合规仅作为私人买方/品牌/招标要求产生——请与进口商确认任何此类商业规范。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 物質限制制度，故巴基斯坦市場准入無須檢測限制物質或四項歐盟鄰苯二甲酸酯，亦無 RoHS 符合性聲明或 RoHS 標誌要求。適用的物質義務仍為中國自身的 RoHS 2 披露標識（SJ/T 11364）及 GB/T 26572 限值，屬中國市場措施。巴基斯坦的 RoHS 等效合規僅作為私人買方/品牌/招標要求產生——請與進口商確認任何此類商業規範。

requirement_topic.en: No REACH-Style SVHC Supply-Chain Notification Duty in Pakistan
requirement_topic.zh: 巴基斯坦无 REACH 式 SVHC 供应链通报义务
requirement_topic.zht: 巴基斯坦無 REACH 式 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務

summary.en: Pakistan does NOT operate a REACH-style chemical regime, and there is no Pakistani obligation equivalent to REACH Article 33 (duty to communicate information on Substances of Very High Concern in articles above 0.1% w/w), no ECHA-style Candidate List that must be tracked biannually, and no SCIP-style database registration for articles placed on the Pakistan market. For LED luminaires, there is therefore no ongoing supply-chain SVHC notification duty as a condition of selling in Pakistan. Chemical/hazardous-material handling in Pakistan is governed by general environmental and import frameworks and the in-country importer's obligations rather than by an articles-level SVHC communication regime. As with RoHS, a private buyer, multinational brand, or specific tender may contractually require SVHC/REACH-style declarations, but this is commercial, not a Pakistani legal market-access duty.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦并未实施 REACH 式化学品制度，亦无相当于 REACH 第 33 条的义务（就物品中浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）的高度关注物质进行信息传递的义务），无须每半年跟踪的 ECHA 式候选清单，亦无对投放巴基斯坦市场物品的 SCIP 式数据库注册。因此，对于 LED 灯具，巴基斯坦销售并不以持续的供应链 SVHC 通报义务为条件。巴基斯坦的化学品/有害材料处理由一般环境及进口框架及当地进口商义务管辖，而非物品层面的 SVHC 传递制度。与 RoHS 一样，个别买方、跨国品牌或特定招标可能以合同方式要求 SVHC/REACH 式声明，但这属商业要求，并非巴基斯坦法律市场准入义务。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦並未實施 REACH 式化學品制度，亦無相當於 REACH 第 33 條的義務（就物品中濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）的高度關注物質進行信息傳遞的義務），無須每半年跟蹤的 ECHA 式候選清單，亦無對投放巴基斯坦市場物品的 SCIP 式數據庫注冊。因此，對於 LED 燈具，巴基斯坦銷售並不以持續的供應鏈 SVHC 通報義務為條件。巴基斯坦的化學品/有害材料處理由一般環境及進口框架及當地進口商義務管轄，而非物品層面的 SVHC 傳遞制度。與 RoHS 一樣，個別買方、跨國品牌或特定招標可能以合同方式要求 SVHC/REACH 式聲明，但這屬商業要求，並非巴基斯坦法律市場准入義務。

standards_or_laws: No Pakistan REACH-style regime — no national equivalent to Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006 (REACH) Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification, no ECHA Candidate List tracking duty, and no SCIP-style database registration for articles

summary.en: China likewise has no direct equivalent to the REACH SVHC Article 33 articles-level supply-chain notification obligation. The closest Chinese instruments are the Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (MEE Order No. 12, 2020) on new chemical substance registration, and GB 30981-2020 (rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals) for hazardous chemicals. None of these create a duty to proactively notify B2B customers or consumers when an SVHC is present in an article above 0.1% w/w. On this specific point, China and Pakistan are similar — neither imposes a REACH Article 33-style articles obligation.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH SVHC 第 33 条物品层面供应链通报义务的制度。最接近的中国工具为《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》（生态环境部令第 12 号，2020 年）关于新化学物质登记，及 GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签规则）用于危险化学品。上述均未产生在物品中 SVHC 浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户或消费者的义务。在此具体点上，中国与巴基斯坦相似——均不施加 REACH 第 33 条式物品义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH SVHC 第 33 條物品層面供應鏈通報義務的制度。最接近的中國工具為《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》（生態環境部令第 12 號，2020 年）關於新化學物質登記，及 GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤規則）用於危險化學品。上述均未產生在物品中 SVHC 濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶或消費者的義務。在此具體點上，中國與巴基斯坦相似——均不施加 REACH 第 33 條式物品義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Unlike the China-to-EU lane, there is no REACH SVHC notification gap to close for the Pakistan market — Pakistan imposes no Article 33-style supply-chain communication duty, no biannual ECHA Candidate List screening, and no SCIP-style registration. Neither China nor Pakistan operates an articles-level SVHC notification regime, so on this point there is no incremental obligation versus what a Chinese manufacturer already does domestically. Practical points: (1) do not build a REACH SVHC screening process specifically for Pakistan market access — it is not legally required there; (2) where a Pakistani buyer, multinational brand, or tender contractually requests SVHC/REACH-style declarations, treat it as a commercial specification and supply the requested substance declarations; (3) general chemical/import handling still flows through the in-country importer and applicable Pakistani environmental/import rules, which should be confirmed for the specific consignment.
gap.zh: 与中国出口欧盟通道不同，巴基斯坦市场不存在需弥补的 REACH SVHC 通报差距——巴基斯坦不施加第 33 条式供应链传递义务、无每半年 ECHA 候选清单筛查，亦无 SCIP 式注册。中国与巴基斯坦均不实施物品层面 SVHC 通报制度，故在此点上相对中国制造商境内既有做法无增量义务。实际要点：（1）请勿专为巴基斯坦市场准入建立 REACH SVHC 筛查流程——在该国并非法律要求；（2）当巴基斯坦买方、跨国品牌或招标以合同方式要求 SVHC/REACH 式声明时，应视为商业规范并提供所需物质声明；（3）一般化学品/进口处理仍经当地进口商及适用的巴基斯坦环境/进口规则流转，应就具体货件予以确认。
gap.zht: 與中國出口歐盟通道不同，巴基斯坦市場不存在需彌補的 REACH SVHC 通報差距——巴基斯坦不施加第 33 條式供應鏈傳遞義務、無每半年 ECHA 候選清單篩查，亦無 SCIP 式注冊。中國與巴基斯坦均不實施物品層面 SVHC 通報制度，故在此點上相對中國製造商境內既有做法無增量義務。實際要點：（1）請勿專為巴基斯坦市場准入建立 REACH SVHC 篩查流程——在該國並非法律要求；（2）當巴基斯坦買方、跨國品牌或招標以合同方式要求 SVHC/REACH 式聲明時，應視為商業規範並提供所需物質聲明；（3）一般化學品/進口處理仍經當地進口商及適用的巴基斯坦環境/進口規則流轉，應就具體貨件予以確認。

mandatory_status.target: Not required — Pakistan has no REACH-style SVHC Article 33 supply-chain notification duty, no ECHA-style Candidate List tracking, and no SCIP-style registration. SVHC/REACH-style declarations may arise only as a private/commercial (buyer or tender) requirement.
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China has no articles-level SVHC supply-chain notification obligation equivalent to REACH Article 33 as of 2026

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan has no REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification regime, so there is no Article 33 communication duty, no biannual ECHA Candidate List screening, and no SCIP-style registration for Pakistan market access. China likewise has no articles-level SVHC obligation, so there is no incremental duty versus existing CN practice. Any SVHC/REACH-style declaration for Pakistan would arise only as a private buyer/brand/tender requirement — confirm any such commercial specification with the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦无 REACH 式 SVHC 供应链通报制度，故巴基斯坦市场准入无第 33 条传递义务、无每半年 ECHA 候选清单筛查，亦无 SCIP 式注册。中国同样无物品层面 SVHC 义务，故相对中国既有做法无增量义务。巴基斯坦的任何 SVHC/REACH 式声明仅作为私人买方/品牌/招标要求产生——请与进口商确认任何此类商业规范。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦無 REACH 式 SVHC 供應鏈通報制度，故巴基斯坦市場准入無第 33 條傳遞義務、無每半年 ECHA 候選清單篩查，亦無 SCIP 式注冊。中國同樣無物品層面 SVHC 義務，故相對中國既有做法無增量義務。巴基斯坦的任何 SVHC/REACH 式聲明僅作為私人買方/品牌/招標要求產生——請與進口商確認任何此類商業規範。

requirement_topic.en: Conformity & Marking Process — PSQCA Conformity Assessment vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定与标志流程——PSQCA 合格评定 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定與標誌流程——PSQCA 合格評定 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Market access for LED lamps/luminaires in Pakistan generally runs through PSQCA (Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority) rather than a self-declared CE-style route or an EU-style multi-directive technical file. Where the lamp/luminaire is on the PSQCA mandatory Conformity Assessment list, the importer/manufacturer must obtain PSQCA conformity assessment and apply the PSQCA conformity/quality mark, supported by test evidence against the adopted PS/IEC standards (PS/IEC 60598, PS/IEC 62560, PS/IEC 61347-2-13, and CISPR 15 / 62471 where applicable). A Pakistan-resident importer is generally required to lodge the application and handle customs clearance at Karachi / Port Qasim. Smart luminaires additionally require PTA type approval (see ledpk-emc-02). There is no horizontal RoHS or REACH obligation bundled into this process (see ledpk-rohs-01/02); the technical file is safety/performance-centric.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦 LED 灯/灯具的市场准入通常经 PSQCA（巴基斯坦标准与质量控制局）办理，而非自我声明的 CE 式路径或欧盟式多指令技术文件。当灯/灯具在 PSQCA 强制合格评定清单上时，进口商/制造商须取得 PSQCA 合格评定并加施 PSQCA 合格/质量标志，并附符合采标 PS/IEC 标准（PS/IEC 60598、PS/IEC 62560、PS/IEC 61347-2-13，及适用时的 CISPR 15 / 62471）的检测证据。通常须由巴基斯坦本地进口商提交申请并在卡拉奇/卡西姆港办理清关。智能灯具另须取得 PTA 型号核准（见 ledpk-emc-02）。此流程不捆绑横向 RoHS 或 REACH 义务（见 ledpk-rohs-01/02）；技术文件以安全/性能为中心。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦 LED 燈/燈具的市場准入通常經 PSQCA（巴基斯坦標準與質量控制局）辦理，而非自我聲明的 CE 式路徑或歐盟式多指令技術文件。當燈/燈具在 PSQCA 強制合格評定清單上時，進口商/製造商須取得 PSQCA 合格評定並加施 PSQCA 合格/質量標誌，並附符合採標 PS/IEC 標準（PS/IEC 60598、PS/IEC 62560、PS/IEC 61347-2-13，及適用時的 CISPR 15 / 62471）的檢測證據。通常須由巴基斯坦本地進口商提交申請並在卡拉奇/卡西姆港辦理清關。智能燈具另須取得 PTA 型號核准（見 ledpk-emc-02）。此流程不捆綁橫向 RoHS 或 REACH 義務（見 ledpk-rohs-01/02）；技術文件以安全/性能為中心。

standards_or_laws: PSQCA Act 1996 — conformity assessment and mandatory conformity/quality marking for items on the PSQCA Conformity Assessment list
PS/IEC 60598 / PS/IEC 62560 / PS/IEC 61347-2-13 — adopted safety standards underpinning PSQCA conformity assessment for lamps and luminaires

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for in-scope luminaires is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and requiring third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized body (e.g., CQC — China Quality Certification Centre); voluntary CQC certification is available for products outside the mandatory CCC scope. For wireless-enabled luminaires, SRRC type approval is additionally required in China. CCC and CQC are China-domestic schemes — the certificates and the GB-standard test reports behind them are not automatically recognised by PSQCA for the Pakistan market.
summary.zh: 在中国，范围内灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，须由 CNCA 授权机构（如中国质量认证中心 CQC）进行第三方认证；非强制 CCC 范围的产品可申请自愿性 CQC 认证。对于无线灯具，中国还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 与 CQC 为中国境内方案——其证书及背后的 GB 标准检测报告不被 PSQCA 自动认可于巴基斯坦市场。
summary.zht: 在中國，範圍內燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，須由 CNCA 授權機構（如中國質量認證中心 CQC）進行第三方認證；非強制 CCC 範圍的產品可申請自願性 CQC 認證。對於無線燈具，中國還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 與 CQC 為中國境內方案——其證書及背後的 GB 標準檢測報告不被 PSQCA 自動認可於巴基斯坦市場。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Both Pakistan (PSQCA conformity assessment + PS mark) and China (CCC + CQC) operate third-party conformity/marking schemes, but they are mutually non-recognised — a CCC certificate and its GB test reports do not satisfy PSQCA, and a separate PSQCA conformity assessment is required for items on Pakistan's mandatory list. Key practical gaps: (1) a Pakistan-resident importer is generally needed to lodge the PSQCA application and clear customs at Karachi / Port Qasim, whereas CCC is handled by the China-side manufacturer/agent; (2) test evidence must align to the PS/IEC editions accepted by PSQCA, and the 230 V / 50 Hz rating must be reflected (vs China 220 V); (3) the PSQCA process is safety/performance-centric and does NOT bundle a horizontal RoHS or REACH obligation, unlike the EU CE+RoHS bundle; (4) smart luminaires need a separate PTA type approval. Plan for importer involvement, PS/IEC-aligned test reports, and 230 V marking; confirm the specific product's mandatory-list status with PSQCA via the importer.
gap.zh: 巴基斯坦（PSQCA 合格评定 + PS 标志）与中国（CCC + CQC）均运行第三方合格评定/标志方案，但互不认可——CCC 证书及其 GB 检测报告不满足 PSQCA，巴基斯坦强制清单项目须另行取得 PSQCA 合格评定。主要实际差距：（1）通常须由巴基斯坦本地进口商提交 PSQCA 申请并在卡拉奇/卡西姆港清关，而 CCC 由中国侧制造商/代理办理；（2）检测证据须对齐 PSQCA 接受的 PS/IEC 版本，并反映 230 V / 50 Hz 额定（相对中国 220 V）；（3）PSQCA 流程以安全/性能为中心，不捆绑横向 RoHS 或 REACH 义务，与欧盟 CE+RoHS 捆绑不同；（4）智能灯具须另行取得 PTA 型号核准。请规划进口商参与、PS/IEC 对齐检测报告及 230 V 标注；并经进口商向 PSQCA 确认具体产品的强制清单状态。
gap.zht: 巴基斯坦（PSQCA 合格評定 + PS 標誌）與中國（CCC + CQC）均運行第三方合格評定/標誌方案，但互不認可——CCC 證書及其 GB 檢測報告不滿足 PSQCA，巴基斯坦強制清單項目須另行取得 PSQCA 合格評定。主要實際差距：（1）通常須由巴基斯坦本地進口商提交 PSQCA 申請並在卡拉奇/卡西姆港清關，而 CCC 由中國側製造商/代理辦理；（2）檢測證據須對齊 PSQCA 接受的 PS/IEC 版本，並反映 230 V / 50 Hz 額定（相對中國 220 V）；（3）PSQCA 流程以安全/性能為中心，不捆綁橫向 RoHS 或 REACH 義務，與歐盟 CE+RoHS 捆綁不同；（4）智能燈具須另行取得 PTA 型號核准。請規劃進口商參與、PS/IEC 對齊檢測報告及 230 V 標註；並經進口商向 PSQCA 確認具體產品的強制清單狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where listed — PSQCA conformity assessment and PS conformity/quality marking required for lamps/luminaires on the PSQCA Conformity Assessment list, generally lodged via a Pakistan-resident importer; smart luminaires additionally require PTA type approval. No horizontal RoHS/REACH obligation bundled.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access for LED lamps/luminaires in Pakistan runs through PSQCA conformity assessment and the PS conformity/quality mark for items on the mandatory Conformity Assessment list, generally lodged via a Pakistan-resident importer with PS/IEC-aligned test evidence and 230 V / 50 Hz rating. Chinese CCC/CQC certification and GB reports are not automatically recognised, and the two schemes are parallel and non-mutual. Unlike the EU CE bundle, the PSQCA process is safety/performance-centric and does not bundle a horizontal RoHS or REACH obligation; smart luminaires additionally need PTA type approval. Confirm the specific product's mandatory-list status with the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦 LED 灯/灯具的市场准入对强制合格评定清单项目经 PSQCA 合格评定及 PS 合格/质量标志办理，通常由巴基斯坦本地进口商凭 PS/IEC 对齐检测证据及 230 V / 50 Hz 额定提交。中国 CCC/CQC 认证及 GB 报告不被自动认可，两种方案并行且互不认可。与欧盟 CE 捆绑不同，PSQCA 流程以安全/性能为中心，不捆绑横向 RoHS 或 REACH 义务；智能灯具另须取得 PTA 型号核准。请与进口商确认具体产品的强制清单状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦 LED 燈/燈具的市場准入對強制合格評定清單項目經 PSQCA 合格評定及 PS 合格/質量標誌辦理，通常由巴基斯坦本地進口商憑 PS/IEC 對齊檢測證據及 230 V / 50 Hz 額定提交。中國 CCC/CQC 認證及 GB 報告不被自動認可，兩種方案並行且互不認可。與歐盟 CE 捆綁不同，PSQCA 流程以安全/性能為中心，不捆綁橫向 RoHS 或 REACH 義務；智能燈具另須取得 PTA 型號核准。請與進口商確認具體產品的強制清單狀態。
